message:
test(wave-44): add 17 pure data-type tests for quic streams/tls, grpc/codec, trace/context

Cover StreamRole, StreamDirection, StreamId, FlowControlError,
QuicStreamError, StreamTableError, CryptoLevel, KeyUpdateEvent,
QuicTlsError, QuicTlsMachine, GrpcMessage, GrpcCodec, IdentityCodec,
TraceFlags, RegionTag, and SymbolTraceContext derive traits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
